text: AWS Local Zones @ st @ sswcr ¢ "1" zone .. so no built in resilience ¢ Think of them like an AZ, but near your location * They are closer to you ... so lower latency. e Not all products support them .. many are opt in w/ limitations e DX to a local zone IS support (extreme performance needs) ¢ Utilise parent region .. i.e EBS snapshots are TO parent e Use local zones when you need THE HIGHEST performance
